name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: rule file missing the required type field is rejected with exit 2
command: printf 'id: g-ts-301\nfixable: null\n' > g-ts-301.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-301.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'type: required' err.txt && echo type_required 1>&2
